name: nauvvi-ton-ai-marketplace
description: Telegram-native AI Creator Toolkit on TON

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,bot,web -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev -w @nauvvi/api" "npm run dev -w @nauvvi/bot" "npm run dev -w @nauvvi/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @nauvvi/shared && npm run build -w @nauvvi/api && npm run build -w @nauvvi/bot && npm run build -w @nauvvi/web
